items.title: Matrix Calculus (MIT OpenCourseWare)
items.author: MIT OCW
items.note: Covers Jacobians, Hessians, and chain rules in matrix form for optimization.

items.title: PyTorch autograd.functional
items.author: PyTorch Team
items.note: API reference for `jacobian`, `hessian`, and vector-Jacobian products.

items.title: Numerical Optimization (Nocedal & Wright)
items.author: Jorge Nocedal & Stephen J. Wright
items.note: Standard reference for Newton methods, quasi-Newton updates, and second-order conditions.
